businessBackground: Myer Holdings is Australia's largest department-store operator and, post Jan 2025 Apparel Brands acquisition, operates as **Myer Group** — a scaled omnichannel retail platform of **769 total stores** across Australia and New Zealand supported by **~17,000 team members** (up to ~30,000 including brand partners per Wirth at 2025 AGM Q&A) and **~11 million total MYER one members of which ~5 million are engaged** (clarified at 2025 AGM Q&A tr. 00:52:30 — prior "5.1M active" figure is the engaged subset, not total registered).

V1.name: Fundamentals Trajectory
V1.rationale: Pro forma EBIT -17.2% in 1H FY26 reflects investment-phase compression, not inflection. Synergies A$30M+ + AB margin-mix tailwind + Value Creation Program (A$8M FY26 / A$16M FY27 quantified 1H FY26 call) + post-finance cash flow A$120M H1 FY26 are real forward levers. **Management alignment sub-assessment (updated post bulk-transcript-review):** (1) Structural — net cash A$287M = **NO leverage-driven discipline**; governance constraint strengthens materially when Lew joins Board April 2026 but NOT YET on Board; Premier-linked management extends beyond Board (Josh Malloy ex-Premier head of property); (2) Alignment signals — **mgmt delivery track record 10 of 12 commitments delivered or on-track across 4 reporting events (M3 upgrades 3.0 DATA-GAP → 3.75 ADEQUATE-STRONG)**; Wirth LTI approved 98.72% AGM; FY25 STI 0% paid (McCartney "disappointed we couldn't pay" — genuine discipline); Wirth 0 ordinary shares (rights only); **no buyback despite A$287M net cash + A$120M/half FCF at 0.4x EV/EBITDA = single largest capital-allocation misalignment**; Exec-Chair using CEO-exemption to avoid annual re-election. M1-M6 composite 3.46 ADEQUATE. Currently AVERAGE, upgrades to STRONG trigger: (a) pro-forma EBIT visibly inflects FY26 result + (b) Lew on Board with continued buying + (c) buyback authorisation.

V2.name: Valuation Mismatch
V2.rationale: **Capiq-sourced peer median EV/EBITDA FY27 = 5.38x** (was rule-of-thumb 7x). MYR FY27 3.44x = 36% discount to median unadjusted; 21-56% discount under MYR-specific haircuts -0.5x to -1.5x. **§10b V2 quant-comparison mandate now satisfied**: mismatch crosses 20% threshold under all credible adjustment depths ≤ -1.0x. Revised PW-FV (undiscounted, weights 5/25/50/20 on cat/bear/base/bull at -1.0x adj): **A$0.501/share = +78% vs A$0.282**; time-discounted 10%×1.75yr = **A$0.426 = +51%**. Bear @ -1.0x adj 4.38x × FY27 EBITDA A$420M = **A$0.288 = +2%**. Generalist cross-check A$0.775 = +175% on current-state financials × peer median (no thesis premium). **New evidence (1H FY26 call): post-finance cash flow A$120M/half = 25% mcap in one half; run-rate FCF A$150-200M/yr = 30-40% FCF yield at current price.** Does not reach EXTREME because: (a) catastrophic FV A$0.116 and hard floor A$0.166 both below current A$0.282 = §10b "floor-case exceeds current" condition mechanically unmet; (b) revised peer-adjusted base FV A$0.516 is LOWER than prior rule-of-thumb A$0.846, compressing absolute upside. EXTREME trigger: price decline toward ~A$0.17 zone OR material upward revision of bear/catastrophic EBITDA assumption.

V3.name: Identifiable Mispricing Reason
V3.rationale: **Bear case articulated in market's own framing** ("dying dept store + overpriced AB acquisition + margin pressure + Perpetual selling + governance questions"). **5 causes enumerated**: scrip dilution (TRANSIENT), FY25 A$213M goodwill impairment (TRANSIENT), H1 FY26 pro forma EBIT compression (TRANSIENT-addressed), Perpetual sell-down (TRANSIENT-RESOLVED 24 Mar 2026), dept-store secular decline (STRUCTURAL-BUT-ADDRESSED via AB diversification + MYER one B2B + brand refresh). **Plus new (bulk-transcript-review): information asymmetry between analyst audience (focused on operations) and AGM audience (where governance/RPT/buyback concerns surface)** — institutional underwriting is pure-execution story, creating 6th explanatory layer. Self-correcting mechanisms: ARITHMETIC (Perpetual cleared), EVIDENTIAL (Lew board April 2026, Mirakl May 2026, MEB live Feb 2026). V3 uncapped — no STRUCTURAL-unaddressed cause.

V4.name: Downside Protection
V4.rationale: **Sub-archetype A (Balance Sheet as Weapon)** with council "illusory net-cash floor" qualifier accepted. Net cash A$287M = 58.9% of mcap; zero drawn debt; A$150M undrawn revolver to May 2028 — but lease liability A$1,630M (~280% of mcap) means net debt incl lease is materially negative; cash floor genuinely shareholder-accessible only IF mgmt does not deploy on bad M&A. **Council bear FV A$0.22 (vs prior local A$0.317)** is the more rigorous anchor — multiple 4.0x (vs prior 4.5x) closer to CapIQ peer-haircut empirical. Asymmetry IMPROVED at current A$0.26 (vs A$0.282 thesis-write): Bear A$0.22 = -15% downside, Base FV A$0.846 = +225% upside = 15:1 risk/reward at council's strict bear. **Revised PW-FV A$0.768 = +196% vs current A$0.26.** 10 failure modes still enumerated, all bounded. Cash floor stays at A$0.166 BUT the "hard" qualifier removed — soft-floor under stress because: (a) operating leases not bank debt but ARE fixed-charge-cover-binding under FCF stress, (b) covenants undisclosed on UNDRAWN revolver, (c) mgmt has net A$287M deployment discretion absent capital-return commitment. Catastrophic (5%) A$0.116 unchanged. Re-route to STRONG would require: explicit buyback authorisation OR committed capital-return policy OR Lew board governance of cash-deployment. (Source: cross-model.py council 2026-04-20 bear-case agent vulnerability #1; debate-session 2026-05-01 V6 PARTIAL CONCEDED.)

V5.name: Thesis Simplicity
V5.rationale: 4 core conditions: (1) AB synergies ≥A$25M run-rate 1H FY27 [HOLDING partial], (2) pro forma OGP stabilises [HOLDING], (3) no AB goodwill re-impairment >A$100M [HOLDING], (4) no capital allocation misstep [HOLDING]. All observable at FY26 result Sep 2026. Multiple partial-substitution levers (AB mix-effect, MEB relaunch, Mirakl) reduce single-point fragility. Too many for STRONG (2 conditions); fewer than WEAK threshold (5+).

V6.name: Upside Optionality
V6.rationale: 6+ independent paths to outperformance: (1) AB value extraction (A$40M synergy + mix-effect), (2) capital return/LBO optionality (A$287M cash + A$150M revolver + A$90.4M franking), (3) MYER one B2B loyalty monetisation (JD Sports + The Dom first external adoption, CBA 5-year renewal), (4) Mirakl marketplace scale (May 2026), (5) merchandise refresh (MEB relaunch Feb-Apr-May 2026 + Topshop/GAP/La Mer/Fenty Beauty/MAC exclusive), (6) operational leverage (NDC Ravenhall A$20M/yr target + Value Creation Program A$16M/yr FY27), plus passive multiple re-rate. At least 6 paths show early evidence materializing. Base-case disappointment still preserves multiple independent paths. Does not reach EXTREME because 3 paths have execution uncertainty or DATA GAPs (NDC slip post-Jan-2027).

V7.name: Evidence Quality
V7.rationale: **Evidence triangle now complete**: (a) 4 audited/reviewed filings processed (FY25 AR PwC, 1H FY26 PwC reviewed, AGM materials, Form 604/605 notices); (b) 4 earnings call transcripts processed via bulk-transcript-review (H1 FY25, FY25, AGM, 1H FY26 — ~52k words / 18-month longitudinal); (c) management credibility track record **10 of 12 commitments delivered or on-track** across 4 consecutive reporting events (only 2 slips, both NDC workstream, quantum unchanged). **DATA GAPs remaining**: peer multiples rule-of-thumb (capiq-data-pull pending — soft-disqualifiable for V2), bank facility covenants, property schedule, AB residual goodwill DCF inputs. Does not reach EXTREME because peer multiples remain rule-of-thumb and structural DATA GAPs persist. V7 = STRONG triggers no caps on V1/V2/V4 (gate condition V7 ≥ AVERAGE met).

V8.name: Catalyst Clarity
V8.rationale: **5 dated catalysts in next 5 months:** Lew joins Board April 2026 (EVIDENTIAL, ~1-2 weeks), interim dividend 21 May 2026 (ARITHMETIC), Mirakl launch May 2026 (EVIDENTIAL), H2 FY26 trading update ~Jul 2026 (EVIDENTIAL), **FY26 result ~Sep 2026 (ARITHMETIC, primary catalyst — synergy run-rate + AB goodwill test + FY27 guidance)**. **New post bulk-review: NDC full implementation slipped to post-Jan-2027 peak** — extends catalyst timeline but doesn't remove it. Mixed ARITHMETIC + EVIDENTIAL. Does not reach EXTREME because most imminent (Lew board) is EVIDENTIAL not ARITHMETIC. **2026-05-14 update (watchlist-audit Action 3):** Lew board commencement now T+14d MECHANICALLY OVERDUE (HotCopper announcement-list verified 2026-05-14; no Appendix 3X observed since 30 Apr 2026). [FACT] Steven Lew (son of Solomon Lew) confirmed via multi-source web verification; GRB 136-concession deal (Aug 2025–) compounds the Lew-family commercial nexus (Premier + GRB + April board seat). [INFERENCE] V8 governance-dimension downgrade-risk has structurally elevated: two pre-committed triggers armed — (a) FY25 AR Note D5 confirmation of GRB-RPT disclosure status (DATA GAP today); (b) Solomon Lew board commencement slippage past 30 Jun 2026 without explanation. **V8 currently HELD STRONG (4)** because pre-committed downgrade trigger is "without explanation" + 30 Jun 2026 deadline — AGM commentary previously cited "Apparel Brands TSA finalisation" as the explanation, so commencement-slippage alone does not yet fire the downgrade. **Formal `conviction-scoring` Partial Rescore on V4 + V8 deferred pending user invocation (Design Philosophy: reasoning-heavy skills are user-confirmation-gated, not autonomous).** (Sources: NOTES.md 2026-05-14 audit-execution entry; QUESTIONS.md updated entries 2026-05-14.)

**Property schedule — owned-vs-leased split** — `[DATA GAP]`. Myer Bourke St flagship + select metro stores may contain embedded real-estate value (sale-leaseback optionality). Not broken out in FY25 AR. Only partial disclosure via AASB 16 ROU assets A$1,130.7M / lease liabilities A$1,629.9M.

**MYER one B2B commercial terms (JD Sports / The Dom / CBA)** — `[DATA GAP]`. Licence fee / rev share / data-access structure not disclosed. Determines whether this is margin-accretive or margin-neutral volume.

noiseFilter: **Daily volume <A$1M moves** — MYR float is thin (1,728M shares, A$493M mcap); intra-day 5-10% moves on sub-A$1M volume = retail noise, not institutional signal. Only volume >A$5M signals institutional repositioning.

**Single-month comp sales swings** — Dept-store / apparel comps are weather-, event-, and Easter/Mother's-Day-shift sensitive. Require 2+ consecutive halves of deterioration before treating as structural.

**Analyst PT moves** — Rule 17: analyst price targets are market-output data. Do NOT anchor FV to them. Consensus PT A$0.77 (Canaccord A$0.79) is tracked as "market-state context" only, NEVER as an upward-confidence adjustment.
**Single-director single-day trades** — Only cluster signals (3+ directors within 30 days) or Lew Group Form 604/605 moves carry thesis weight. Isolated A$10-50k director trades are PR noise.

**Short-term ASX queries on disclosure** — ASX can issue queries on any disclosure. Response within 10 business days = operational noise. Only unresolved / escalated queries touching financial-statements integrity are structural.

**Sass&bide / Marcs / David Lawrence individual-brand margin swings** — These three brands are ~A$10M synergy target combined; individual brand performance is noise vs the aggregated A$40M total synergy pool. Only aggregate tracking matters.

**52-week-low prints on intraday / weekly ticks (13 Apr 2026 A$0.28)** — **[FACT]** MYR printed 52-wk low A$0.28 on 13 Apr 2026 during broader ASX Small Ords sell-off (XSO -10.65% 3-mo to 17 Apr before recovering +9.5% 1-mo). XSO recovery + Perpetual substantial-holder exit (24 Mar 2026) → absorbable short-term mechanical flow, NOT thesis breakdown. **[INFERENCE]** Only a close below A$0.25 sustained for 5+ sessions on volume >A$5M/day = meaningful. Single-day 52-wk lows during sector-wide risk-off = noise. (Source: 2026-04-21_Weekly_Leading_Indicator_Scan.md, §Cross-Ticker D2 + §MYR B6) **Update 2026-05-15:** new 52-wk low A$0.25 set 4 May 2026; MYR A$0.25 live (prices.py 2026-05-15). Still AT — not sustained below — the A$0.25 meaningful-threshold; classification holds, floor under test.
